text: Think oxytocin is just the love hormone? Think again. Oxytocin influences social bonding, but its effects are more complex than you might believe. Studies suggest it can enhance trust, but it can also amplify fear in stressful situations. Research shows oxytocin's role shifts with context, affecting our responses based on environment. So, it's not just about love. It's about how we react to those we care for in different scenarios. Curious about how oxytocin impacts your relationships? Like and follow for more insights!
